overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character travels along sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers and elevated highways, transitioning from open streets to enclosed underpasses and emerging into commercial districts with bright neon billboards.

events.description: red sports car passes by on the left side of the street
character overtakes pedestrian with distinctive purple mohawk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk past the NC CLEANING building, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian with purple mohawk and black jacket walking in same direction

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated yellow NC CLEANING signage on the facade
curved elevated roadway structure with orange accent lighting underneath
massive black skyscraper with scattered illuminated windows rising into the dusk sky
tall palm tree visible against the darkening sky near the highway ramp

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open urban sidewalk beside the NC CLEANING building during dusk. The street features moderate traffic with futuristic cars passing by, while the elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction, and tall skyscrapers dominate the skyline ahead.

events.description: entering dark underpass beneath massive elevated highway structure
passing under large concrete support pillars with artificial street lighting becoming dominant

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit underpass beneath massive concrete highway structures, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the highway above with weathered texture
illuminated vertical advertising screen showing colorful graphics and text

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow enclosed space beneath the elevated highway. Massive concrete support pillars line the walkway, and artificial lighting replaces natural dusk light. Digital advertising kiosks provide colorful illumination on the right as the character continues walking through the underpass.

events.description: exiting underpass into open commercial area with bright neon billboards and storefronts
multiple futuristic sports cars pass by on the street including a silver coupe

agents.ego_description: walking past luxury storefronts and large digital advertisements in a brightly lit commercial zone

notable_agents.action: silver sports car with glowing accents driving past on the street

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying FERUID luxury brand advertisement with silhouetted figures
modern commercial building with AVANT signage and glass facade
digital speed limit sign displaying 40 in white text
cluster of tall futuristic skyscrapers with extensive illuminated windows and geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a vibrant commercial district dominated by large digital billboards including a prominent FERUID advertisement. The AVANT building features modern glass architecture with neon accent lighting. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance to the left while futuristic traffic continues along the multi-lane street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a city street at dusk that transitions from an open urban sidewalk into a dim underpass before emerging into a neon-lit commercial district. It begins beside the NC CLEANING building, moving along a sidewalk beneath a curving elevated highway ramp as futuristic cars pass by and skyscrapers loom ahead. As the character continues forward, the open sky vanishes and the scene shifts into a narrow enclosed space beneath the highway, where massive concrete pillars and colorful digital kiosks replace the natural dusk light. The camera then emerges from the shadows of the underpass into a vibrant district dominated by the glass architecture of the AVANT building and a prominent FERUID digital billboard. Finally, the view opens up to a multi-lane street filled with futuristic traffic, with the elevated highway receding into the distance to the left.
